title: Next-Cycle Recommendations
recommended_next_cycle: AG08A or AG07R — Repeatable Article Upgrade Cycle Planning

recommended_options.title: Repeat AG07-style cycle for another single article
recommended_options.recommended_when: Use when improving one more existing static article with the same controlled doctrine.
recommended_options.required_starting_boundary: one target article path, backup plan, controlled apply plan and post-apply audit

recommended_options.title: Create a batch-capable controlled upgrade design
recommended_options.recommended_when: Use only after one-article repeatability is trusted and batch risk controls are defined.
recommended_options.required_starting_boundary: batch size, per-article backups, per-article marker checks, rollback matrix and batch audit

recommended_options.title: Reference/visual enrichment sub-cycle
recommended_options.recommended_when: Use when the article needs verified reference insertion or visual enrichment before wider upgrade.
recommended_options.required_starting_boundary: verified URL population, source credibility review, visual credit/alt/caption approval

recommended_options.title: Static-live manual verification
recommended_options.recommended_when: Use after Vercel deployment confirms the committed static change is visible.
recommended_options.required_starting_boundary: manual browser checklist, mobile view check, reference/visual visibility check and rollback note
